metadata.description: A collection of agent plugins for LLM observability, API exploration, and development workflows

plugins.name: langfuse
plugins.description: General-purpose Langfuse integration for data exploration, dashboard management, prompt versioning, datasets, and experiments.

plugins.name: openapi-tools
plugins.description: Skills for listing and inspecting OpenAPI endpoints on running services.

plugins.name: llm-application-dev
plugins.description: LLM application design and schema-guided reasoning patterns.

plugins.name: python-dev-workflow
plugins.description: Python-specific pytest, Redis test patterns, Celery, and unit-test review/execution agents.

plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: Git, PRs, tickets, releases, and review-comment workflows.

plugins.name: work-session-tools
plugins.description: Productivity and orchestration inside an assistant session.

plugins.name: ai-assistant-ops
plugins.description: Assistant setup, instruction hygiene, memory capture, and markdown/prompt maintenance.

plugins.name: os-tools
plugins.description: Operating-system utilities for local machine automation.

plugins.name: cloud-storage-tools
plugins.description: Dropbox, Google Drive, OneDrive, and MEGA style user-file storage tools.

plugins.name: job-hunt-toolkit
plugins.description: Version-controlled job application workspace with resume tailoring, PDF export, metadata scrubbing, and pre-send checks.
